title: Grilled Poke with Syrian Pepper
description: A flavorful and healthy poke dish made with grilled fish, topped with a spicy Syrian pepper sauce and crunchy xtra.
instructions: Marinate the poke in a mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, and minced garlic for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the poke for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Meanwhile, mix the crushed xtra and Syrian pepper to create the spicy sauce.
Once the poke is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin pieces.
Serve the grilled poke with the spicy sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional xtra and Syrian pepper if desired.
